stages.purpose: Convert human need into bounded paper commitments and owner decisions.
stages.completion_gate: confirmed owner decision or recorded owner-gated assumption; no worker may silently change this stage
stages.activation_policy: activate when owner motivation, venue, claim scope, or private-source policy is unclear

stages.purpose: Make raw paper inputs locatable and support-safe.
stages.completion_gate: claim-relevant sources are locator-backed or explicitly unresolved
stages.activation_policy: activate when source or evidence inventory is missing/stale

stages.purpose: Understand field scene, template expectations, exemplar structure, and related-work positioning.
stages.completion_gate: research dossier and template/profile outputs are source-located and safe to consume
stages.activation_policy: activate when field/template/SOTA is uncertain

stages.purpose: Identify viable contribution framings without treating speculation as evidence.
stages.completion_gate: viable options are classified as supported, owner-gated, or rejected
stages.activation_policy: activate when contribution is unstable or weak

stages.purpose: Bind evidence and citations to exact claim boundaries.
stages.completion_gate: every claim-bearing unit has support strength, evidence anchor, allowed wording, and forbidden wording
stages.activation_policy: activate before claim-bearing writing or review

stages.purpose: Synthesize paper argument path and reader/reviewer questions.
stages.completion_gate: spine is coherent and claim-bounded before writing begins
stages.activation_policy: activate for new section or major rewrite

stages.purpose: Decide how paper objects appear across sections and at what granularity.
stages.completion_gate: writing units can consume explicit object and granularity instructions
stages.activation_policy: activate for full paper route or when object repetition risk exists

stages.purpose: Turn reader/object design into paragraph-level rhetorical and terminology controls.
stages.completion_gate: main text can be generated without unsupported claims, raw internal ids, or lab-notebook smell
stages.activation_policy: activate before writing execution

stages.purpose: Decide which figures, tables, algorithms, and formulas exist and what they prove.
stages.completion_gate: no final/export-facing figure proceeds without contract, evidence, and backend route
stages.activation_policy: activate when figure/table/algorithm/formula is touched

stages.purpose: Choose the minimal control material set needed by the target manuscript unit.
stages.completion_gate: S09B can build a task packet without guessing upstream controls
stages.activation_policy: activate before per-unit packet assembly

stages.purpose: Compile one bounded writing TaskPacket for a section/unit.
stages.completion_gate: packet is bounded and cannot grant graph-completion or recursive-dispatch authority
stages.activation_policy: activate when a worker needs a section/unit packet

stages.purpose: Produce candidate manuscript modules from task packets.
stages.completion_gate: candidate text is validated and collected; graph completion remains controller-owned
stages.activation_policy: activate when writing execution is needed

stages.purpose: Produce figures, captions, tables, algorithms, formulas, and export bundles.
stages.completion_gate: figure/caption has editable source, rendered output, provenance, QA route, and claim support
stages.activation_policy: activate when figure/caption/formal artifacts are touched

stages.purpose: Assemble modules and check cross-section dependencies.
stages.completion_gate: integrated candidate is ready for adversarial review, not final
stages.activation_policy: activate when multiple modules are integrated

stages.purpose: Generate actionable review/loss signals, not uncontrolled rewrites.
stages.completion_gate: accepted findings are actionable and routed to nearest responsible upstream material
stages.activation_policy: activate when candidate manuscript/module exists

stages.purpose: Convert review/loss signals into local repair tasks.
stages.completion_gate: no accepted finding remains unrouted
stages.activation_policy: activate when review finding exists

stages.purpose: Execute bounded backflow task and regenerate only affected downstream outputs.
stages.completion_gate: graph records new version and affected nodes are revalidated
stages.activation_policy: activate when repair task exists

stages.purpose: Package final paper and prove delivery cleanliness.
stages.completion_gate: content-ready and delivery-clean states are separately proven; external submission remains owner-gated
stages.activation_policy: activate when export/handoff requested

stages.purpose: Define permissions, route governance, and state controls before automation.
stages.completion_gate: governance constraints are recorded and cannot inject department metadata into paper-facing cognition
stages.activation_policy: activate before automation/permissions/state changes

stages.purpose: Manage presentation, patent, profile-specific derivative packages, or other post-paper outputs after paper stability or explicit owner request.
stages.completion_gate: only explicit owner request can activate derivative output; otherwise recorded not-applicable/deferred
stages.activation_policy: activate only after paper content stability or explicit derivative request
